field_values.action_summary: In the Arizona hills, 1865, John Carter and James Powell discover a massive gold-bearing quartz vein. They agree on a plan: Powell will head back to civilization for machinery while Carter stays to guard the claim.
field_values.emotional_beat: From hard labor/prospecting to sudden euphoria and ambitious planning.
field_values.camera_intent: Wide shots of rugged landscape; Medium close-ups of reacting faces; Insert shots of gold vein
field_values.end_state: scene resolves into the next narrative beat
movement_notes: Physical appearance of the gold vein
Specific tools and gear used by prospectors
field_values.transition_notes:
# Scene Contract: CH001_SC001

## Production Intent
Establish the discovery of a massive gold-bearing quartz vein in the Arizona hills to trigger the inciting incident. The scene must transition from the physical exhaustion of prospecting to the high-stakes planning of a claim defense and resource acquisition.

## Required Cast
- john_carter
- james_k_powell

## Required Environments
- arizona_quartz_vein_location

## Continuity Constraints
- Physical appearance of the gold vein (size, color, texture)
- Specific tools/gear used by the prospectors during labor

## Beat List
- BT001: Hard labor and prospecting
- BT002: The discovery of the gold vein
- BT003: Euphoria and strategic planning
field_values.dialogue_relevance: dialogue supports scene intent and continuity
